CollectionRecord.title: Collection Record
CollectionRecord.description: A record of a user collecting a specific animal.

userId.description: The ID of the user who collected the animal.

animalId.description: The ID of the collected animal.

animalName.description: The name of the collected animal.

animalImageUrl.description: The image URL of the collected animal.

soundUrl.description: The sound URL of the collected animal.

characteristics.description: The characteristics of the collected animal.

diet.description: The diet of the collected animal.

habitat.description: The habitat of the collected animal.

lat.description: The latitude where it was collected.

lng.description: The longitude where it was collected.
